approvalNote: Peter selected Maya for the young learner, River through a phone-speaker treatment for the app mentor, and Lily for narration on 2026-06-03. The tagline uses 'earn your levels' rather than 'get qualified' until formal accreditation is real.

learner_maya_younger.role: Selected young learner voice; Maya with a younger, excited outdoor delivery

mentor_river_steward.role: Selected app mentor voice; rendered raw first, then processed as phone-speaker output

narrator_lily.role: Selected narrator voice; cool, hopeful, lightly aspirational

takes.speaker: young_learner
takes.text: [young teenager, excited, outdoors, natural, breathless but clear] It's working! My pond's holding water now. What can I do to attract nature? Especially frogs.

takes.speaker: young_learner
takes.text: [young teenager, curious, beginning to understand] So basically make it a good home and be patient?

takes.speaker: app_mentor
takes.text: [warm, wise, grounded land-and-water mentor, gentle, practical, no caricature] Nice work. Add native pond plants, make a shallow edge, and leave some messy shelter nearby. Don't collect frogs or frogspawn from the wild. If the habitat is right, the right creatures will find it.

takes.speaker: app_mentor
takes.text: [warm, encouraging, grounded land-and-water mentor, gentle, practical] Exactly. I think you're ready to submit your Level 2 Pond Challenge now.

takes.speaker: narrator
takes.text: [cool, hopeful, lightly aspirational, clear narrator] Living Water Skills. Learn outside. Capture the evidence. Earn your levels. Grow from curious to capable.
